title: FP8 (W8A8 dynamic) vs AWQ-int4  (+ draft = production spec-decode)
subtitle: 2x R9700 TP=2, single-user, fp8 KV. Decode bars = short-ctx no-spec (2026-05-27 ref); max-context + spec RE-MEASURED 2026-05-31 post-iommu=pt
note: iommu=pt cleared a TP2 long-context P2P wedge (NCCL renegotiation storm; no-spec decode collapse 0.68->16.83 tok/s @131K). KEY 256K finding (re-measured 2026-05-31; full detail in benchmarks/fp8-256k-campaign-2026-05-31.json): in FP8 only the two A3B-MoE models reach TRUE single-user 256K (no-spec). FP8 + draft @ 256K works ONLY for Coder-30B (EAGLE3 — tiny 361MB draft, pure MoE) -> ~86 tok/s coherent, 256K served. Qwen3.6-35B + DFlash ALSO reaches 256K (~45 tok/s coherent, accept ~3.9) once chunked-prefill is lowered to 2048 — the prior 'OOMs@256K' was a prefill-transient (gdn_backend/fused-MoE per-chunk), NOT a draft+verify memory wall (KV pool 782K was never the limit); cp2048 clears it (validated 253K-tok prefill). launch.sh auto-applies cp2048 for qwen36-moe FP8 when spec-decode is on. So FP8+draft@256K now works for BOTH A3B-MoE models (Coder-30B EAGLE3 86, Qwen3.6-35B DFlash 45). Dense/SWA cap below 256K in FP8: Devstral-2-24B ~131K single-seq @mem0.90 (BF16 vision tower eats KV; pool 180K), gemma-4-26B ~32-64K (torch_native attention has NO FlashAttention -> global-attn layers OOM at long prefill; Triton attn crashes with SWA on RDNA4). Decode bars (fp8_toks/awq_toks) are the short-ctx 2026-05-27 snapshot, NOT re-measured; the re-measured no-spec @32K post-fix is ~18/18 for Coder/Qwen3.6-35B, ~23 Devstral-2, ~9.9 gemma. PATCH 045 UPDATE (2026-05-31): dense CT-FP8 DeltaNet-VL (Qwen3.6-27B, Qwen3.5-27B) FIXED — was OOMing from a replicated FP8 MLP (28.7 GB/card); patch 045 TP-splits it → native FP8 20.82 GB/card, boots FULL 256K (KV pool 408K). fp8_ctx_k 34->256 = TRUE 256K validated. patch 045 (TP-split MLP) gave 256K boot; the residual FP8 fallback-GEMM prefill OOM @mem0.90 was then cleared by a LOW-RISK knob — chunked-prefill 2048 shrinks the per-chunk transient → full 245760-tok prefill serves @mem0.90 (9.3 tok/s, coherent). launch.sh auto-applies chunked-prefill 2048 for dense FP8 qwen36-27b/qwen35; A3B-MoE FP8 keeps 8192. No core GEMM surgery needed. gemma-4-31B serves native FP8 (17.57 GB/card, no fallback; its cap is memory, not a bug).
